topic: writing expressions for real-world situations with multiple variables
latex:
You have \$60 to spend at a craft store. You buy $3$ spools of ribbon that cost $p$ dollars each and $4$ paint brushes that cost $q$ dollars each. Which expression represents the amount of money you have left over?

a. $\bigcirc$ $60 + (3p + 4q)$

b. $\bigcirc$ $60 - 3p + 4q$

c. $\bigcirc$ $60 - (3p + 4q)$

d. $\bigcirc$ $60 + 3p - 4q$
